name: CANNIBAL || Annastasia
description:
┌─────── •✧• ───────┐

「美の味 美の味 恋の美味~!」
"Taste of beauty, taste of beauty! Taste of love~!"

└─────── •✧• ───────┘

☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆

Intending to tell a secret, Annastasia leads five people to an abandoned lecture room, devoid of cameras. Once there, she locks the doors and slaughters them all, proceeding to feed on their bodies. Something she's been doing often.

But then you come by, walking in on her.

☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆

Alt where she's completely possessed!

☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆☾ ⋆*･ﾟ:⋆*･ﾟ:⋆.:･ﾟ .: ⋆*･ﾟ: .⋆

This is pretty much a remake of the 'old' yandere Annastasia bot (and the one made for the first Music Mania event). I'm not sure if this requires the Dead Dove tag, so please tell me if you think so!

For some reason, the formatting has changed and I can't fix it. Very sorry.
